title: Savory Vegan Soufflé
description: A rich and creamy vegan soufflé, perfect for a dinner party. This recipe combines the savory flavors of roasted vegetables with a hint of smokiness.
instructions: 2. In a food processor, blend the bread crumbs and chickpea flour until well combined.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together the aquafaba, vegan butter, smoked paprika, roasted garlic, and French thyme.
4. Add the blended bread crumb mixture to the aquafaba mixture and stir until well combined.
6. Pour the mixture into a greased soufflé dish and smooth the top.
7. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until puffed and golden brown.
